title: ST-015 Quality Operations Dashboard
description: Weekly quality operations visibility for ECR target attainment, reviewer outcomes, and calibration alignment.

query.sql: SELECT audit_week_start_utc, ecr, ecr_target, target_status FROM quality_ops_weekly_reports ORDER BY audit_week_start_utc DESC LIMIT 26
SELECT audit_week_start_utc, low_confidence_labeling_rate FROM quality_ops_weekly_reports ORDER BY audit_week_start_utc DESC LIMIT 26
SELECT audit_week_start_utc, reviewer_queue_closure_rate, reviewer_queue_item_count, reviewer_queue_resolved_count FROM quality_ops_weekly_reports ORDER BY audit_week_start_utc DESC LIMIT 26

SELECT audit_week_start_utc, reviewer_backlog_open_count, reviewer_backlog_in_progress_count, reviewer_outcome_counts_json, calibration_policy_version FROM quality_ops_weekly_reports ORDER BY audit_week_start_utc DESC LIMIT 26

SELECT audit_week_start_utc, ecr, ecr_target, escalation_owner_role, escalation_triggered_at_utc FROM quality_ops_weekly_reports WHERE target_status = 'below_target' ORDER BY audit_week_start_utc DESC LIMIT 26
